truth_source_or_reference: simulated event-mode labels, artifact labels and low-identifiability states generated outside TED output
uncertainty_or_variance: 95% CI columns for event recovery, event-mode accuracy, timing error, artifact rejection, overclaim, block generalization and downgrade rate
reported_metrics: event recovery; event-mode accuracy; artifact rejection; overclaim rate; downgrade behavior
audit_note: Synthetic generator defines labels before scoring; used as ground-truth correctness, not reporting-field availability.

truth_source_or_reference: designed null/stress/artifact scenarios in which no TED-development claim should be promoted
scored_units: 16 scenario-method rows; n_tests recorded per row
uncertainty_or_variance: false-positive counts, artifact-rejection counts and per-scenario pass/fail
audit_note: Negative-control truth is external to TED claim-boundary output.

truth_source_or_reference: held-out perturbation, time and embryo-block summary units from ZSCAPE
scored_units: 36 holdout rows with n_events per row
uncertainty_or_variance: held-out significant fraction, event-mode class counts and block-permutation support fraction
reported_metrics: event-mode preservation; held-out support; summary-level boundary behavior
audit_note: Summary proxy used for event-mode generalization; not raw-expression refitting or perturbation-specific causal truth.

truth_source_or_reference: pre-specified guide-level event families, negative controls and adapter claim gates
uncertainty_or_variance: no pooled CI; guide-level candidate, downgrade and rejection counts are reported
audit_note: Locked adapter validation; not a full trajectory or rescue benchmark.

truth_source_or_reference: same inputs and split units as TED benchmark; expert workflow combines upstream signals, block tests, matched-state controls, negative controls and manual claim caps
uncertainty_or_variance: metric table plus replicate metric outputs
reported_metrics: event recovery; event-mode accuracy; artifact rejection; overclaim rate
audit_note: Comparator approximates careful manual analysis; reporting-field availability is summarized separately from biological correctness.

truth_source_or_reference: fixed output schema and field-map audit
audit_note: Not used to claim native-method inferiority; records whether a reader can audit an event claim from the output.
